headline: Oppenheimer Upgrades Quanta Services (PWR) to Outperform
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) is one of the 10 Best American Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade. On May 28, 2026, Oppenheimer upgraded Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) to Outperform from Perform with an $800 price target following a transfer of coverage. Oppenheimer said Quanta is “positioned in markets with superior growth prospects,” […]

headline: Here's Why Investors Should Hold ROL Stock in Their Portfolios Now
summary: Rollins leans on steady buyouts, tech upgrades and rising dividends to drive growth, even as margin pressure and higher interest costs weigh on profitability.

headline: Shares of companies within the broader industrial sector are trading lower amid overall market weakness after unexpectedly strong U.S. job-growth data dampened expectations for a Fed rate cut.

headline: Jacobs Secures Major SSEN Contracts for Grid Modernization Efforts
summary: J lands SSEN grid-modernization frameworks worth over $1B, spanning OT, cybersecurity and AI-enabled digital services in northern Scotland.
